title: Kingavon BB-RT357 12-LED Desk Lamp
features: Lightweight ABS material and integrated handle
description: Product Description Kingavon desk lamp is manufactured from a lightweight ABS material and comes with 12 super bright white LED bulbs, a 135 degree adjustable angle head, on and off push button and integral handle making it ideal for portable applications. It requires 3x AA batteries which are not included. Size: 11cm x 7.5cm x 20cm approx. Kingavon supplying quality Lighting, household electrical and security products. Box Contains 1x Lamp
